## 📋 Today's Overview
*July 23, 2026*

### Majorana (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on a Schwarzschild black hole background, employing the transverse-field Ising model as a quantum simulator to address the challenge of directly observing Majorana fermions and related curved-spacetime phenomena like Hawking radiation.

### Qubit (5 new today)

1. The study focuses on trapped-ion quantum computers (TIQC), employing a hybrid system architecture called iSwitch that uses bare qubits for single-qubit operations and QEC-encoded logic for logical CNOTs to address the challenge of enabling early fault-tolerant quantum computing with efficient error correction.
2. The study focuses on a tunable double-junction transmon qubit, employing a superconducting circuit element with a tunnel junction in series with a SQUID loop to address the objective of achieving strongly tunable Josephson harmonics for advanced qubit design.
3. The study focuses on quantum circuit simulators, employing a pilot-wave simulator approach to address the problem of exponential memory and computational overhead that limits accurate classical sampling from ideal and noisy quantum circuits up to hundreds of qubits.
4. The study focuses on correlated quantum-chemistry calculations, employing quantum virtual-orbital fragmentation (Q-FVO) with an inclusion-exclusion many-body expansion to address the objective of reducing qubit requirements by minimizing the largest active space.
5. The study focuses on the Dicke model, employing a variational framework on both fully qubit-based and hybrid qubit-boson-based quantum computers to address the problem of simulating collective light-matter interactions in finite-size systems.

---

| 1 | **[Simulating Majorana fermions in black hole with Ising Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18805v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum field theory (QFT) in curved spacetime has led to profound predictions, including the Unruh effect and Hawking radiation, yet their direct observation remains extraordinarily challenging because of their extremely weak signatures. Here, we show that the transverse-field Ising model provides a quantum simulator for Majorana fermions in a Schwarzschild black hole background. Remarkably, different coordinate representations of the same spacetime-Schwarzschild, tortoise, Kruskal, and conformally flat-map onto distinct microscopic Ising spin models. Despite their microscopic differences, these models converge in the continuum limit to the same Majorana field theory, exhibiting an emergent form of general covariance. This provides a rare example of a fundamental symmetry of general relativity arising as an emergent property of a condensed matter system. We further demonstrate how black hole particle production can be simulated and detected through spin correlation measurements, and discuss experimental platforms capable of realizing these models. Our work establishes a practical route for investigating fermionic QFT in curved spacetime using controllable quantum many-body systems and tabletop experiments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>弯曲时空中的量子场论已催生深刻预言，包括安鲁效应与霍金辐射，然而因其信号极其微弱，直接观测仍面临巨大挑战。本文证明，横场伊辛模型可作为施瓦西黑洞背景中马约拉纳费米子的量子模拟器。值得注意的是，同一时空——施瓦西坐标、龟坐标、克鲁斯卡尔坐标及共形平直坐标——的不同坐标表示，分别映射为截然不同的微观伊辛自旋模型。尽管这些模型在微观层面存在差异，但在连续极限下均收敛至同一马约拉纳场论，展现出一种涌现形式的广义协变性。这为广义相对论的基本对称性作为凝聚态系统涌现性质提供了罕见范例。我们进一步展示了如何通过自旋关联测量模拟并探测黑洞粒子产生过程，并讨论了可实现这些模型的实验平台。本研究利用可控量子多体系统与桌面实验，为研究弯曲时空中费米子量子场论开辟了可行路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-21 | John Vienn A. Estremadura et al. |
| 2 | **[Phase-controlled quasi-bound states in the continuum and thermoelectric enhancement in Majorana-quantum-dot nanostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.15990v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate how the interplay between Majorana zero modes (MZMs) and bound states in the continuum (BICs) governs the electronic thermoelectric response of a crossbar-shaped quantum dot (QD) coupled to two topological-superconductor nanowires. Using the Green-function formalism, exact linear-response energy integrals, and their low-temperature Sommerfeld expansion, we analyze the spectral and thermoelectric properties of the system. We show that symmetry breaking converts BICs into quasi-BICs, allowing them to contribute to electrical and thermal transport and thereby generate a finite thermoelectric response. While unequal nanowire lengths, reflected in different intra-Majorana coupling strengths, produce only a modest enhancement of $ZT_{el}$, detuning the QD level increases $ZT_{el}$ by approximately one order of magnitude. Superconducting-phase control produces a much stronger enhancement, reaching $ZT_{el} \simeq 0.75$ through a quadratic transmission zero and a pronounced violation of the Wiedemann-Franz law. The low-temperature values $ZT^{max}_{el} \simeq 0.755$ and $\mathscr{L} /\mathscr{L}_{0} = 21/5$ are universal consequences of this quadratic antiresonance. Our results establish phase-tunable thermoelectric signatures of the Majorana-coupled interference structure and identify superconducting-phase control as an efficient means of engineering the electronic response of topological hybrid nanostructures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了马约拉纳零模与连续谱中的束缚态之间的相互作用如何调控与两条拓扑超导纳米线耦合的十字形量子点的电子热电响应。利用格林函数形式、精确线性响应能量积分及其低温索末菲展开，我们分析了该系统的谱学与热电性质。研究表明，对称性破缺将连续谱中的束缚态转化为准束缚态，使其能够参与电输运和热输运，从而产生有限的热电响应。尽管纳米线长度不等（体现为不同的马约拉纳内耦合强度）仅能使$ZT_{el}$适度增强，但量子点能级的失谐可将$ZT_{el}$提升约一个数量级。超导相位调控可产生更强的增强效应，通过二次传输零点及对维德曼-弗朗兹定律的显著偏离，使$ZT_{el}$达到约0.75。低温下的$ZT^{max}_{el} \simeq 0.755$及$\mathscr{L} /\mathscr{L}_{0} = 21/5$是这种二次反共振的普适结果。我们的研究确立了马约拉纳耦合干涉结构的相位可调热电特征，并识别出超导相位控制是调控拓扑杂化纳米结构电子响应的有效手段。</p></details> | 2026-07-17 | Alejandro Garrido et al. |
| 3 | **[Avoiding Dilution: Using Diffusion and Vision Transformers to resolve Majorana Features in Nanowires at High Temperature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.14949v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Identifying Majorana zero modes in semiconductor--superconductor nanowires requires ultra-low temperature transport measurements in dilution refrigerators, making device screening slow and resource-intensive. Here, we investigate whether high-temperature conductance data can be used to infer low-temperature Majorana nanowire properties before committing devices to dilution-refrigerator characterization. We generate paired high- and low-temperature conductance simulations for disordered Majorana nanowires and train neural networks to perform two related tasks. First, we use a Shifted Window U-Net Transformer diffusion-inspired architecture to reconstruct low-temperature conductance from thermally broadened high-temperature measurements, achieving high-fidelity recovery with $R^2 \approx {0.95}$ for local conductance and $R^2 \approx {0.91}$ for nonlocal conductance. Second, we train a Video Vision Transformer-based network to predict the low-temperature topological visibility directly from high-temperature conductance, obtaining $R^2 \approx {0.80}$. These results demonstrate that machine-learning models can recover and infer low-temperature Majorana features from experimentally easier high-temperature data, providing a practical route for rejecting poor devices early thus avoiding slow and resource-intensive dilution refrigeration for non-promising devices. This high-temperature screening approach could substantially accelerate the experimental feedback loop for Majorana nanowire device development.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>。我们发现，在拓扑侧，开链中出现马约拉纳边缘模，表现为奇偶宇称基态间的能量劈裂随系统尺寸增大而消失。此外，非对角的两点关联函数显示出非局域的、依赖于宇称的边缘效应。这些关联揭示了多体波函数中马约拉纳模的空间结构。我们证明该关联诊断方法具有广泛适用性，包括短程相互作用模型——由于缺乏体激发能隙，此类模型中的拓扑超导电性更为脆弱。</p></details> | 2026-07-16 | Jacob R. Taylor et al. |
| 4 | **[Majorana edge modes in isolated wires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.00158v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Topological superconductors are believed to host exotic quasiparticle excitations known as Majorana zero-modes (MZMs), with much of the evidence based on BCS mean-field theory. The direct application of mean-field arguments is tenuous in finite, isolated systems relevant in some experiments. Here, we develop a new correlation-based method for identifying MZMs in interacting, number-conserving systems. Using DMRG, we study fermion number-conserving models with long-range interactions, which under periodic boundary conditions exhibit robust topological and non-topological superconductivity, tuned by the strength of interaction [1]. We find evidence that, on the topological side, Majorana edge modes appear in open chains, manifesting as the vanishing of the energy splitting between odd- and even-parity ground states with increasing system size. Additionally, off-diagonal two-point correlation functions show nonlocal, parity-dependent edge effects. These correlations reveal the spatial structure of Majorana modes in the many-body wavefunction. We show that the correlation diagnostic applies broadly, including to short-range interacting models, where topological superconductivity is more fragile due to the absence of a bulk excitation gap.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>拓扑超导体被认为承载称为马约拉纳零模（MZMs）的奇异准粒子激发，相关证据多基于BCS平均场理论。在部分实验所涉及的有穷孤立系统中，直接应用平均场论证是薄弱的。本文针对相互作用的粒子数守恒系统，开发了一种基于关联函数的新方法用于识别MZMs。利用DMRG方法，我们研究了具有长程相互作用的费米子数守恒模型，在周期性边界条件下，该模型通过调节相互作用强度可呈现稳健的拓扑与非拓扑超导电性</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Jaden Thomas-Markarian et al. |
| 5 | **[Formation and Evolution of the Spin-Charge-Entangled Screening Cloud in the Majorana-Kondo System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.16446v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Side-coupled Majorana zero modes in Kondo systems realize a simple yet nontrivial hybridization setup that leads to distinct physics from the conventional Kondo effect. We have demonstrated in a previous work that the system can be described by a spin-charge-entangled (SCE) quantum impurity model with an Andreev$\otimes$normal boundary condition. Here we investigate in detail the formation process and microscopic mechanism of the SCE screening cloud using the numerical renormalization group method. We introduce temperature-dependent spatially integrated correlation functions that provide an unambiguous diagnostic of different components of the SCE screening cloud beyond the impurity entropy and local density of states. Our results reveal a crossover from a sequential two-stage screening of the spin and charge components to a simultaneous screening controlled by a single parameter. We also study the evolution of the low-energy fixed points in the presence of competing terms that break different symmetries and drive the system to different infrared fixed points. Our results suggest that the SCE screening effect in the Majorana-Kondo system makes itself a route to detecting Majorana zero modes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近藤体系中的侧耦合马约拉纳零模实现了一种简单但非平庸的杂化结构，从而产生与常规近藤效应截然不同的物理现象。我们先前的工作已证明，该体系可用具有安德烈夫⊗正常边界条件的自旋-电荷纠缠（SCE）量子杂质模型来描述。本文利用数值重整化群方法，详细研究了SCE屏蔽云的形成过程与微观机制。我们引入了与温度相关的空间积分关联函数，该函数能够超越杂质熵和局域态密度，为SCE屏蔽云的不同组分提供明确的诊断依据。研究结果揭示了从自旋与电荷分量的顺序两阶段屏蔽到由单一参数控制的同步屏蔽的交叉行为。我们还研究了在存在破坏不同对称性并驱动体系趋向不同红外不动点的竞争项时，低能不动点的演化过程。结果表明，马约拉纳-近藤体系中的SCE屏蔽效应为探测马约拉纳零模提供了一条可行路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Yun Chen et al. |
| 6 | **[Majorana string simulation of nonequilibrium dynamics in two-dimensional lattice fermion systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.02809v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The study of real-time dynamics of fermions remains one of the last frontiers beyond the reach of classical simulations and is key to our understanding of quantum behavior in chemistry and materials, with implications for quantum technology. Here we introduce a Heisenberg-picture algorithm that propagates observables expressed in a Majorana-string basis using a truncation scheme that preserves Trotter accuracy and aims at maintaining computational efficiency. The framework is exact for quadratic Hamiltonians -- remaining restricted to a fixed low-weight sector determined by the physical observable -- admits variational initial states, and can be extended to interacting regimes via systematically controlled truncations. We benchmark our approach on one- and two-dimensional Fermi-Hubbard quenches, comparing against tensor network methods (MPS and fPEPS) and recent experimental data. The method achieves high accuracy on timescales comparable to state-of-the-art variational techniques and experiments, demonstrating that controlled Majorana-string truncation is a practical tool for simulating two-dimensional fermionic dynamics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>费米子实时动力学的研究仍是经典模拟难以触及的最后前沿之一，对于理解化学与材料中的量子行为至关重要，并对量子技术具有深远意义。本文提出一种海森堡图像算法，该算法通过截断方案传播以马约拉纳弦基表示的观测量，在保持特罗特精度的同时力求维持计算效率。该框架对二次型哈密顿量具有精确性——始终局限于由物理观测量确定的固定低权重扇区——可容纳变分初始态，并能通过系统可控的截断扩展至相互作用区域。我们通过一维与二维费米-哈伯德淬火对方法进行基准测试，与张量网络方法（MPS与fPEPS）及近期实验数据展开对比。该方法在时间尺度上实现了与前沿变分技术及实验相当的高精度，证明可控马约拉纳弦截断是模拟二维费米子动力学的实用工具。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Matteo D'Anna et al. |
| 7 | **[Majorana parity qubit in coupled minimal Kitaev chains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09511v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Majorana zero modes provide a route to fault-tolerant qubits by encoding information non-locally in fermion parity. Their sensitivity to noise is expected to decrease exponentially with increasing separation between the Majoranas, a suppression known as topological protection. Kitaev chains engineered in quantum dot-superconductor arrays provide a tunable platform in which separated Majorana zero modes can emerge at the ends of the chain, even in two-site chains. These minimal-chain modes are known as poor man's Majoranas and retain characteristic Majorana properties, including near-zero energy and equal electron-hole character, but have only limited protection. A key outstanding challenge is to move beyond identifying such modes in electrical transport measurements and achieve coherent qubit control in the time domain. Here, we demonstrate a Majorana parity qubit by realizing coherent coupling between two-site Kitaev chains. Since total fermion parity is conserved, the system separates into global even and odd parity manifolds. We observe coherent parity oscillations in both manifolds with equal oscillation frequencies at the Majorana sweet spot, as predicted for isolated Majorana zero modes. We further show that the oscillation frequency and coherence depend systematically on inter-chain coupling and quantum-dot detunings, in close agreement with our model for short, partially protected chains. Our results establish the first coherent control of a Majorana qubit, encoded in the fermion parity of Majorana zero modes in minimal Kitaev chains.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>马约拉纳零模通过将信息非局域地编码在费米子奇偶性中，为容错量子比特提供了途径。其对噪声的敏感性预计随马约拉纳之间距离的增加而指数级下降，这种抑制称为拓扑保护。在量子点-超导体阵列中构建的Kitaev链提供了一个可调平台，其中分离的马约拉纳零模可在链端出现，即使在双位点链中也是如此。这些最小链模被称为穷人马约拉纳模，保留了马约拉纳模的特性，包括近零能量和等量的电子-空穴特征，但保护性有限。一个关键挑战是超越在电输运测量中识别此类模式，实现时域中的相干量子比特控制。在此，我们通过实现双位点Kitaev链之间的相干耦合，演示了马约拉纳奇偶性量子比特。由于总费米子奇偶性守恒，系统分为全局偶奇偶性和全局奇奇偶性流形。我们在两个流形中均观察到相干奇偶性振荡，且在马约拉纳甜点处振荡频率相等，正如孤立马约拉纳零模所预测的那样。我们进一步表明，振荡频率和相干性系统性地依赖于链间耦合和量子点失谐，与我们对短、部分保护链的模型高度一致。我们的结果建立了对马约拉纳量子比特的首次相干控制，该量子比特编码在最小Kitaev链中马约拉纳零模的费米子奇偶性中。</p></details> | 2026-07-10 | Francesco Zatelli et al. |

### Qubit

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[iSwitch: QEC on Demand via In-Situ Encoding of Bare Qubits for Ion Trap Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.16303v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent advances in quantum hardware and error correction have paved the way for early fault-tolerant (EFT) quantum computing. We propose iSwitch, a hybrid system architecture for trapped-ion quantum computers (TIQC) that exploits ultra-high-fidelity single-qubit gates and efficient logical CNOTs enabled by ion shuttling. iSwitch employs bare qubits for single-qubit operations and QEC-encoded logical qubits for two-qubit gates, avoiding full logical encoding, gate synthesis, and magic state distillation. To enable this selective encoding, we develop a low-noise conversion protocol between bare and logical qubits, a hybrid instruction set tailored to 2D TIQC layouts, and a compiler that minimizes conversion overhead and optimizes scheduling. Evaluations on variational quantum algorithm benchmarks show that iSwitch achieves comparable fidelity to conventional QEC methods, while reducing qubit and operation counts by roughly 33-50%, offering a practical, resource-efficient path toward EFT quantum computing on trapped-ion platforms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子硬件与纠错技术的最新进展为早期容错（EFT）量子计算铺平了道路。我们提出iSwitch，一种针对离子阱量子计算机（TIQC）的混合系统架构，该架构利用超高保真单量子比特门以及通过离子穿梭实现的高效逻辑CNOT门。iSwitch对单量子比特操作采用裸量子比特，对双量子比特门则采用QEC编码的逻辑量子比特，从而避免了完整的逻辑编码、门合成和魔法态蒸馏。为实现这种选择性编码，我们开发了裸量子比特与逻辑量子比特之间的低噪声转换协议、专为二维TIQC布局定制的混合指令集，以及一个能最小化转换开销并优化调度的编译器。在变分量子算法基准测试上的评估表明，iSwitch在实现与传统QEC方法相当保真度的同时，将量子比特和操作数量减少了约33-50%，为在离子阱平台上实现早期容错量子计算提供了一条实用且资源高效的路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-21 | Keyi Yin et al. |
| 2 | **[Higher Josephson harmonics in a tunable double-junction transmon qubit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.08470v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Tunable Josephson harmonics open new avenues for qubit design. We demonstrate a superconducting circuit element consisting of a tunnel junction in series with a SQUID loop, yielding a Josephson potential whose harmonic content is strongly tunable by magnetic flux. Through spectroscopy of the first four qubit transitions, together with an effective single-mode model renormalized by the internal mode, we resolve a second harmonic with an amplitude up to $\sim10\%$ of the fundamental. We identify a flux sweet spot where the dispersive shift vanishes, achieved by balancing the dispersive couplings to the internal and qubit modes. This highly tunable element provides a route toward protected qubits and customizable nonlinear microwave devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>可调谐的约瑟夫森谐波为量子比特设计开辟了新途径。我们展示了一种超导电路元件，它由一个隧道结与一个SQUID环串联而成，产生的约瑟夫森势的谐波含量可通过磁通量进行强调谐。通过对前四个量子比特跃迁进行光谱分析，并结合经内部模式重整化的有效单模模型，我们解析出了一个振幅高达基波约10%的二次谐波。我们识别出一个通量甜点，在该点通过平衡与内部模式和量子比特模式的色散耦合，色散位移消失。这种高度可调谐的元件为受保护量子比特和可定制非线性微波器件提供了一条实现路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-21 | Ksenia Shagalov et al. |
| 3 | **[Pilot-Wave Simulator: Exact Classical Sampling from Ideal and Noisy Quantum Circuits up to Hundreds of Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.24218v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum circuit simulators running on classical computers offer a vital platform for designing, testing, and optimizing quantum algorithms, driving innovation despite limited access to real quantum hardware. However, their scalability is inherently constrained by exponential memory and computational overhead, which restricts accurate simulation of large-scale quantum circuits and often results in approximate output distributions. Here, we propose an exact sampling algorithm that integrates tensor network contraction techniques with a Markov process, wherein a classical state evolves according to the local structure of the quantum circuit. As a demonstration, we target the challenge of generating samples from ideal and noisy QAOA circuits with up to 476 qubits, incorporating both depolarizing and amplitude damping noise models. These results enable further validation of several assumptions and conjectures at a scale previously out of reach, significantly expanding the scope of classical simulation in quantum algorithm research.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在经典计算机上运行的量子电路模拟器为设计、测试和优化量子算法提供了重要平台，即便在真实量子硬件访问受限的情况下，也能推动创新。然而，其可扩展性固有地受限于指数级的内存和计算开销，这限制了对大规模量子电路的精确模拟，并常常导致输出分布近似。在此，我们提出一种精确采样算法，该算法将张量网络收缩技术与马尔可夫过程相结合，其中经典态根据量子电路的局部结构进行演化。作为演示，我们针对从包含多达476个量子比特的理想和含噪QAOA电路（同时包含退极化和振幅阻尼噪声模型）中生成样本这一挑战。这些结果使得在先前无法企及的规模上进一步验证若干假设和猜想成为可能，显著拓展了量子算法研究中经典模拟的范围。</p></details> | 2026-07-21 | Gleb Kalachev et al. |
| 4 | **[Fragmentation of Virtual Orbitals for Quantum Computing: Reducing Qubit Requirements through Many-Body Expansion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20950v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce quantum virtual-orbital fragmentation (Q-FVO), a systematic method for reducing the largest active space in correlated quantum-chemistry calculations. The complete occupied space is retained, the localized virtual space is partitioned into chemically motivated fragments, and the correlation energy is recovered through an inclusion-exclusion many-body expansion. Across six molecular benchmarks, the largest one-body Q-FVO calculations reduce the qubit requirement by 46 to 66 percent, while two-body calculations reduce it by approximately 31 to 42 percent relative to the corresponding unfragmented spaces. Two-body expansions recover most of the correlation energy, with errors of 0.9 to 7.5 kcal/mol; three-body expansions are below 1 kcal/mol for all CCSD tests and remain below 2 kcal/mol at CCSD(T). Illustrative statevector UCCSD calculations also reduce implementation-reported circuit depth while retaining accuracy below 1 kcal/mol. Q-FVO can be nested inside Q-EFMO real-space fragmentation and, in turn, the resulting cluster can be embedded in a Q-EFP environment. The hierarchy therefore reduces quantum-resource growth along three complementary dimensions: environment, molecular fragments, and virtual-orbital space.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入量子虚拟轨道碎片化（Q-FVO），这是一种用于缩减关联量子化学计算中最大活性空间的系统性方法。该方法保留完整的占据空间，将局域化的虚拟空间划分为具有化学动机的碎片，并通过包含-排除多体展开恢复关联能。在六个分子基准测试中，相对于相应的未碎片化空间，最大单体型Q-FVO计算将量子比特需求降低了46%至66%，而双体型计算则降低了约31%至42%。双体展开恢复了大部分关联能，误差在0.9至7.5 kcal/mol之间；对于所有CCSD测试，三体展开的误差低于1 kcal/mol，在CCSD(T)水平下仍保持在2 kcal/mol以下。示例性的态矢量UCCSD计算在保持低于1 kcal/mol精度的同时，也减少了文献中报告的电路深度。Q-FVO可以嵌套在Q-EFMO实空间碎片化方法中，并且生成的簇可以进一步嵌入Q-EFP环境中。因此，该层级结构沿着三个互补维度——环境、分子碎片和虚拟轨道空间——减少了量子资源的增长。</p></details> | 2026-07-21 | Federico Zahariev et al. |
| 5 | **[Simulating the Dicke Model on Qubit-Based and hybrid Qubit-Boson-Based Quantum Computers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18546v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Dicke model provides a fundamental description of collective light-matter interactions and has long served as a testbed for exploring a wide range of physical phenomena in quantum optics and condensed matter physics. In this work, we develop a variational framework for investigating the finite-size Dicke model on both fully qubit-based (digital) and hybrid qubit boson based (digital-analogue) quantum computing platforms. We show that the resulting model reproduces the characteristic critical behavior of the Dicke model in the appropriate large-spin limit while remaining suitable for implementation on both classical emulators of quantum computers and actual trapped ion quantum computers, albeit in the case of latter somewhat limited by noise. Finally, we introduce a complementary hybrid qubit-bosonic variational ansatz that directly exploits the bosonic degree of freedom to reduce quantum resources and discuss its potential implementation on hybrid quantum hardware. Our results establish a scalable, symmetry-aware framework for variational quantum simulations of collective light-matter systems and provide a pathway toward efficient simulations of more general spin-boson models on near-term quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>迪克模型提供了对集体光-物质相互作用的基本描述，并长期作为探索量子光学和凝聚态物理学中广泛物理现象的试验平台。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个变分框架，用于在全量子比特基（数字）和混合量子比特-玻色子基（数字-模拟）量子计算平台上研究有限尺寸的迪克模型。我们表明，所得模型在适当的大自旋极限下再现了迪克模型的特征临界行为，同时仍适用于经典量子计算机模拟器和实际离子阱量子计算机（尽管后者在一定程度上受噪声限制）。最后，我们引入一种互补的混合量子比特-玻色子变分拟设，该拟设直接利用玻色子自由度来减少量子资源，并讨论了其在混合量子硬件上的潜在实现。我们的结果为集体光-物质系统的变分量子模拟建立了一个可扩展、对称性感知的框架，并为在近期量子设备上更高效地模拟更一般的自旋-玻色子模型提供了一条途径。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Aravind P. Babu et al. |
| 6 | **[Learning Volterra Memory Kernels for Non-Markovian Qubit Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.09075v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We develop a data-driven framework for identifying non-Markovian equations of motion for open quantum systems, demonstrated here for qubit-environment dynamics. Starting from the Nakajima-Zwanzig formalism, we vectorize the reduced density matrix into a four-dimensional state vector and cast the dynamics as a Volterra integro-differential equation with an operator-valued memory kernel. The learning task is then formulated as a constrained optimization problem over the admissible operator space, where correlation functions are approximated by rational functions using Pade approximants. We establish well-posedness of the learning problem, ensuring existence of minimizers. To assess performance, we construct synthetic data sets from representative test problems of increasing complexity: (i) exactly solvable pure dephasing, with correlation functions expressed in terms of special functions, (ii) a damped Jaynes-Cummings model with an analytic coherence kernel, (iii) a transverse Born model with frequency-resolved bath integrals and population-coherence coupling, and (iv) a non-rotating-wave quantum Rabi model whose memory kernel has no closed form. Numerical experiments demonstrate that Pade captures nontrivial temporal structures such as oscillatory memory, algebraic tails, and phase-sensitive coherence transfer, and that the learned models generalize across ensembles of physically admissible initial states. We perform a parametrization-invariant sensitivity analysis and show that the trajectories are insensitive to the unrecoverable parts of the kernel, so the learned models stay predictive despite severe ill-conditioning in kernel recovery. These results together illustrate that data-driven rational approximation provides an effective route to identifying non-Markovian kernels of practical relevance in quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一种数据驱动框架，用于识别开放量子系统的非马尔可夫运动方程，并以量子比特-环境动力学为例进行演示。从Nakajima-Zwanzig形式出发，我们将约化密度矩阵向量化为四维状态向量，并将动力学描述为带有算符值记忆核的Volterra积分微分方程。学习任务被表述为允许算符空间上的约束优化问题，其中关联函数通过Padé逼近用有理函数近似。我们建立了学习问题的适定性，确保极小值的存在性。为评估性能，我们构建了来自具有递增复杂性的代表性测试问题的合成数据集：(i) 精确可解的纯退相位，其关联函数用特殊函数表达；(ii) 具有解析相干核的阻尼Jaynes-Cummings模型；(iii) 具有频率分辨浴积分和布居-相干耦合的横向Born模型；(iv) 记忆核无闭合形式的非旋转波量子Rabi模型。数值实验表明，Padé方法能够捕捉非平凡的时间结构，如振荡记忆、代数尾部和相位敏感的相干转移，并且所学模型能够推广到物理允许初始态系综。我们进行了参数化不变的敏感性分析，并表明轨迹对核的不可恢复部分不敏感，因此尽管核恢复存在严重病态性，所学模型仍保持预测能力。这些结果共同说明，数据驱动有理逼近为识别量子技术中具有实际意义的非马尔可夫核提供了一条有效途径。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Jimmie Adriazola et al. |
| 7 | **[Pulse Shaping for Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.21565v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-fidelity control of superconducting qubits requires carefully shaped microwave pulses to avoid several different kinds of error at once. This article is a pedagogical bridging text aimed at upper-level undergraduate and early graduate students who have completed an introductory quantum mechanics course and a first course in quantum computing or quantum information, but who have not yet encountered the physical implementation of qubit gates. We integrate physical intuition for pulse design, analytical gate-level descriptions, and practical hardware considerations into a single, derivation-driven narrative, with explicit learning objectives. We begin with simple pulse envelopes and their spectral properties, showing how finite bandwidth produces leakage outside the computational subspace. This motivates the derivative removal by adiabatic gate (DRAG) technique, which we derive explicitly using the Magnus expansion, obtaining a clear, order-by-order account of which physical error channel appears at which order and why DRAG's cancellation is necessarily incomplete. We discuss the practical hardware realities of control pulse generation, focusing on arbitrary waveform generators (AWG), local oscillators (LO), and IQ mixing. Finally, we extend the discussion to two-qubit operation via the cross-resonance gate, and interpret how driving the control qubit at the target qubit's transition frequency necessarily produces several unwanted interaction terms alongside the desired one, and how successive generations of pulse-engineering strategies have been designed to suppress them.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子比特的高保真度控制需要精心设计的微波脉冲，以同时避免多种不同类型的误差。本文是一篇教学性衔接文本，面向已完成量子力学入门课程及量子计算或量子信息初级课程、但尚未接触量子比特门物理实现的高年级本科生和低年级研究生。我们将脉冲设计的物理直觉、解析门级描述和实际硬件考量整合到一个以推导驱动的单一叙述中，并附有明确的学习目标。我们从简单的脉冲包络及其频谱特性开始，展示有限带宽如何产生计算子空间外的泄漏。这引出了绝热门导数去除（DRAG）技术，我们利用Magnus展开显式推导该技术，清晰、逐阶地说明每个物理误差通道出现在哪一阶以及DRAG的抵消为何必然不完整。我们讨论了控制脉冲生成的实际硬件现实，重点关注任意波形发生器（AWG）、本地振荡器（LO）和IQ混频。最后，我们将讨论扩展到通过交叉共振门实现的双量子比特操作，并解释以目标量子比特跃迁频率驱动控制量子比特如何必然产生多个不需要的相互作用项以及所需的项，以及如何设计连续几代脉冲工程策略来抑制它们。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Animesh Patra et al. |
| 8 | **[All-electrical dephasing-protected spin qubits in altermagnets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26066v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose altermagnetic semiconductors as a platform for field-free, all-electrically controlled spin qubits in gate-defined quantum dots. The momentum-dependent spin splitting of an altermagnet produces a Zeeman-like qubit splitting whose magnitude and sign are set by the dot ellipticity, enabling local frequency tunability without external magnetic fields or micromagnets. Because the splitting is tied to a fixed altermagnetic quantization axis, electric-field noise is longitudinally suppressed at leading order, while quantization-axis fluctuations couple transversely and therefore cause relaxation rather than pure dephasing. The compensated magnetic order also avoids stray fields, making the platform naturally compatible with superconducting resonators and dispersive circuit-QED readout through the qubit's spin-dependent electric dipole. Starting from an effective quantum-dot model, supported by a microscopic lattice model, we derive the single- and two-dot Hamiltonian models. We show that electric-dipole spin resonance enables single-qubit control, while tunable exchange and electrically addressable qubit frequencies realize fSim two-qubit gates. The same double-dot architecture also supports singlet-triplet qubits with electrical control of both exchange and splitting gradients, removing the need for micromagnets or nuclear-polarization gradients. These results establish altermagnetic quantum dots as a route to field-free spin qubits with intrinsic electrical tunability and enhanced dephasing protection.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出交变磁性半导体作为门定义量子点中无磁场、全电控自旋量子比特的平台。交变磁体的动量依赖自旋分裂产生类塞曼的量子比特分裂，其大小和符号由量子点椭圆度决定，从而无需外部磁场或微磁体即可实现局部频率可调性。由于分裂与固定的交变磁量化轴相关联，电场噪声在主导阶被纵向抑制，而量化轴波动以横向方式耦合，因此导致弛豫而非纯退相位。补偿磁序还避免了杂散场，使该平台天然兼容超导谐振器和通过量子比特自旋依赖电偶极子实现的色散电路QED读出。从有效量子点模型出发，辅以微观晶格模型，我们推导了单点和双点哈密顿模型。我们展示了电偶极自旋共振可实现单量子比特控制，而可调交换作用和电寻址量子比特频率可实现fSim双量子比特门。相同的双点架构还支持单重态-三重态量子比特，其交换作用和分裂梯度均可电控，从而消除了对微磁体或核极化梯度的需求。这些结果确立了交变磁性量子点作为无磁场自旋量子比特的途径，具有内在电可调性和增强的退相位保护。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | José Carlos Abadillo-Uriel et al. |
| 9 | **[Stationary two-qubit entanglement mediated by one-dimensional plasmonic nanoarrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.16016v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Entanglement is one of the key measures of quantum correlations present in nanophotonic systems, with promising applications in quantum optics and beyond. Previous studies have shown that the degree of entanglement between two quantum dot qubits is preserved when a metal nanoparticle is used to mediate the interactions between the qubits. In this work, we investigate long-range plasmonic mediation of qubit--qubit entanglement by studying the impact of the number of mediating metal nanoparticles on stationary concurrence. Collinear and periodically spaced metal nanoparticles that satisfy the weak-coupling approximation are considered. An effective model that enables the derivation of the mediated interactions within the framework of cavity quantum electrodynamics is employed. Under weak driving at the single particle resonance frequency, the model shows that odd-number arrays are more robust to entanglement decay. We attribute this to strong inter-qubit dissipative coupling as a result of a hybridized dipole plasmon resonating with the driving frequency in odd-number arrays. These arrays can sustain non-vanishing stationary entanglement beyond an inter-qubit spacing of one micron, opening up the possibility of independent spatial optical probing of each quantum dot.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>纠缠是纳米光子系统中量子关联的关键度量之一，在量子光学等领域具有广阔应用前景。先前研究表明，当使用金属纳米粒子介导两个量子点量子比特之间的相互作用时，它们之间的纠缠度得以保持。在本工作中，我们通过研究介导金属纳米粒子数量对稳态并发度的影响，探讨了量子比特-量子比特纠缠的长程等离激元介导。我们考虑了满足弱耦合近似的共线且等间距的金属纳米粒子。采用了一个有效模型，该模型能在腔量子电动力学框架内推导介导相互作用。在单粒子共振频率的弱驱动下，该模型显示奇数编号阵列对纠缠衰减更具鲁棒性。我们将其归因于奇数编号阵列中杂化偶极等离激元与驱动频率共振所导致的强量子比特间耗散耦合。这些阵列能在超过一微米的量子比特间距下维持非零的稳态纠缠，为每个量子点的独立空间光学探测开辟了可能性。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Luke C. Ugwuoke et al. |
| 10 | **[Nanoscale stray fields from micromagnets for optimal spin qubit architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.15333v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>On-chip micromagnets generate local magnetic-field asymmetries, enabling electrical control of spin qubits via electric dipole spin resonance and their integration into circuit quantum electrodynamics (QED) architectures. Accurate prediction of spin-qubit performance requires modeling micromagnet stray fields beyond the saturated-magnet approximation, accounting for nonuniform magnetization. Here, we combine thin-film characterization of Co, Co/Ta multilayers, and CoFe films with nanoscale stray-field measurements using NV-center magnetometry in the unsaturated regime to establish a reliable micromagnetic simulation framework. We show that CoFe micromagnets generate antisymmetric fields in double quantum-dot geometries exceeding +/- 100mT, owing to their high saturation magnetization and favorable magnetocrystalline anisotropy. For spin qubits coupled to microwave resonators, the predicted spin-photon coupling reaches $\left| g_s/g_c \right| \approx 0.5$, where $g_c$ denotes the charge-photon coupling strength of the underlying charge qubit, highlighting the potential for high-fidelity operations in circuit QED architectures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>片上微磁体产生局部磁场不对称性，使得通过电偶极自旋共振实现自旋量子比特的电控，并将其集成到电路量子电动力学（QED）架构中。准确预测自旋量子比特性能需要对微磁体杂散场进行建模，超越饱和磁化近似，并考虑非均匀磁化。在此，我们将Co、Co/Ta多层膜和CoFe薄膜的薄膜表征与使用NV中心磁力测量在非饱和区进行的纳米尺度杂散场测量相结合，以建立可靠的微磁模拟框架。我们表明，CoFe微磁体在双量子点几何结构中产生超过±100 mT的反对称场，这归因于其高饱和磁化强度和有利的磁晶各向异性。对于耦合到微波谐振器的自旋量子比特，预测的自旋-光子耦合强度达到|g_s/g_c| ≈ 0.5，其中g_c表示底层电荷量子比特的电荷-光子耦合强度，凸显了在电路QED架构中实现高保真度操作的潜力。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Sandrine Lopes et al. |
| 11 | **[Temporal Diffraction Grating for Engineered Superconducting Qubit Dissipation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17562v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Parametric frequency modulation is a standard tool in superconducting circuits for activating tunable interactions and implementing quantum gates. Here, we engineer dissipation in a flux-tunable transmon qubit by using sideband modulation to bring it into resonance with a lossy resonator, opening an on-demand Purcell decay channel. We find that pulsing this channel on and off does not simply lower the time-averaged decay rate; instead, it reorganizes the dissipation spectrum into a structured interference pattern. A Chebyshev-propagator model for the repeated on/off block reproduces the measured spectra and reveals a close structural correspondence to N-slit Fraunhofer diffraction, with each on-window acting as a temporal aperture. By varying the pulse duration and duty cycle, we demonstrate control over the spacing, contrast, and envelope of the dissipation spectrum. These results establish pulsed parametric modulation as a direct method for shaping engineered dissipation in superconducting circuits and provide a new control knob for open quantum system dynamics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>参数频率调制是超导电路中用于激活可调相互作用和实现量子门操作的标准工具。本文通过边带调制，将通量可调谐的transmon量子比特与有损谐振器共振，从而在耗散工程中按需打开Purcell衰变通道。我们发现，脉冲式开关该通道并非简单地降低时间平均衰变率，而是将耗散频谱重组为结构化的干涉图样。基于切比雪夫传播子的重复开关模块模型能够复现测量频谱，并揭示其与N缝夫琅禾费衍射在结构上的紧密对应关系——每个开启窗口相当于一个时间孔径。通过改变脉冲持续时间和占空比，我们展示了对耗散频谱间距、对比度和包络的控制能力。这些结果确立了脉冲参数调制作为超导电路耗散工程直接方法的地位，并为开放量子系统动力学提供了新的调控手段。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Pratik J. Barge et al. |
| 12 | **[Quantum phase estimation with optimal confidence interval using three control qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.16474v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum phase estimation is an important routine in many quantum algorithms, particularly for estimating the ground state energy in quantum chemistry simulations. This estimation involves applying powers of a unitary to the ground state, controlled by an auxiliary state prepared on a control register. In many applications the goal is to provide a confidence interval for the phase estimate, and optimal performance is provided by a discrete prolate spheroidal sequence. We show how to prepare the corresponding state in a far more efficient way than prior work. We find that a matrix product state representation with a bond dimension of 4 is sufficient to give a highly accurate approximation for all dimensions tested, up to $2^{24}$. This matrix product state can be efficiently prepared using a sequence of simple three-qubit operations. When the dimension is a power of 2, the phase estimation can be performed with only three qubits for the control register, making it suitable for early-generation fault-tolerant quantum computers with a limited number of logical qubits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子相位估计是许多量子算法中的重要环节，尤其在量子化学模拟中用于估算基态能量。该过程涉及将酉算子的幂次作用于基态，并由控制寄存器上制备的辅助态进行控制。在许多应用中，目标是为相位估计提供置信区间，而离散长球面序列可实现最优性能。我们展示了如何以远优于先前工作的效率制备对应量子态。研究发现，键维数为4的矩阵乘积态足以在高达$2^{24}$的所有测试维度上提供高精度近似。该矩阵乘积态可通过一系列简单的三量子比特操作高效制备。当维度为2的幂次时，仅需三个控制寄存器量子比特即可完成相位估计，使其适用于逻辑量子比特数量有限的早期容错量子计算机。</p></details> | 2026-07-20 | Kaur Kristjuhan et al. |
| 13 | **[Unitary dynamics and resource trade-offs in a four-qubit isotropic Heisenberg XXX chain with tunable next-nearest-neighbor coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.04429v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This study derives the unitary dynamics of a four qubit Heisenberg XXX chain with tunable next nearest neighbor coupling $α$, starting from a Bell type initial state, and analyzes the evolution of quantum resources under the phase $φ=(α+1)t$. We provide closed form expressions for fidelity $F(ρ(0), ρ(t))$, coherence $C_{l_1}(ρ(t))$, and two qubit entanglement of formation $E_F(t)$ for subsystems $12$ and $34$, all of which are governed by $φ$. Fidelity exhibits periodic behavior with $F = \lvert \cos(φ/2) \rvert$ and a frozen regime at $α= -1$ where $F \equiv 1$. Coherence follows $C_{l_1}(ρ(t)) = \sin^2(φ/2)$, showing increasing sensitivity with $\lvert α+1 \rvert$ and vanishing at $α= -1$. Entanglement of formation $E_F(t)$ is an entropic function of $φ$, displaying banded oscillations and freezing at $α= -1$. The phase $φ$ unifies the behavior of all diagnostics, linking faster dynamics to larger $\lvert α+1 \rvert$ and revealing maximal sensitivity at $(α+1)t = π/4 + kπ/2$. This integrated framework provides exact benchmarks for small quantum devices and a clear pathway to noise, finite temperature, and larger system extensions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本研究推导了具有可调次近邻耦合参数$α$的四量子比特海森堡XXX链从贝尔型初态开始的幺正动力学，并分析了量子资源在相位$φ=(α+1)t$下的演化。我们给出了子系统$12$和$34$的保真度$F(ρ(0), ρ(t))$、相干性$C_{l_1}(ρ(t))$和两量子比特纠缠形成度$E_F(t)$的闭式表达式，三者均由$φ$主导。保真度呈现周期性行为，满足$F = \lvert \cos(φ/2) \rvert$，并在$α= -1$时出现冻结区域（$F \equiv 1$）。相干性遵循$C_{l_1}(ρ(t)) = \sin^2(φ/2)$，其敏感性随$\lvert α+1 \rvert$增大而增强，并在$α= -1$时消失。纠缠形成度$E_F(t)$是$φ$的熵函数，呈现带状振荡并在$α= -1$时冻结。相位$φ$统一了所有诊断量的行为，将更快的动力学与更大的$\lvert α+1 \rvert$关联，并在$(α+1)t = π/4 + kπ/2$处揭示最大敏感性。这一集成框架为小型量子设备提供了精确基准，并为噪声、有限温度及更大系统扩展指明了清晰路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-19 | Seyed Mohsen Moosavi Khansari et al. |
| 14 | **[Analytic $C_{\ell_1}$ norm of Coherence Evolution for Bell States under a Two-Qubit Superconducting Hamiltonian](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07033v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present the first exact analytic study of unitary coherence dynamics in a minimal two qubit superconducting system with zz-coupling and transverse Josephson tunneling. By deriving the full time evolution operator without approximations and propagating all four Bell state initial conditions, we obtain novel closed form time dependent pure state density matrices and an explicit analytic expression for the C_(l_1 ) norm of coherence that, to our knowledge, has not been previously reported in the literature. Two of the Bell states are shown to be invariant under the model dynamics with constant coherence, whereas the other two exhibit controlled, parameter dependent coherence oscillations. The oscillatory behavior is governed by two distinct frequency scales that directly map onto the circuit coupling and tunneling parameters, allowing for predictable tuning of amplitude and periodicity. Numerical visualizations clarify operating regimes for transient enhancement or suppression of coherence. These results deliver compact, analytically tractable tools for parameter optimization and provide a clear foundation for incorporating dissipation and experimental validation.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们首次在具有zz耦合和横向约瑟夫森隧穿的最小两量子比特超导系统中，对幺正相干动力学进行了精确解析研究。通过推导不含近似的完整时间演化算符并传播所有四种贝尔态初态，我们获得了新颖的含时纯态密度矩阵闭式解，以及$C_{l_1}$相干范数的显式解析表达式——据我们所知，该结果此前未见文献报道。其中两种贝尔态在模型动力学下保持恒定相干性不变，而另外两种则表现出受控的、参数依赖的相干振荡。振荡行为由两个不同的频率尺度主导，这两个尺度直接映射到电路耦合和隧穿参数，从而实现对振幅和周期性的可预测调控。数值可视化结果阐明了用于瞬态增强或抑制相干性的工作区域。这些结果为参数优化提供了紧凑且可解析处理的工具，并为引入耗散及实验验证奠定了清晰基础。</p></details> | 2026-07-19 | Seyed Mohsen Moosavi Khansari et al. |
| 15 | **[Comparative assessment of germanium-based spin-qubit modalities: donor, acceptor, gate-defined hole, and gate-defined electron platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13680v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-purity germanium (Ge) has re-emerged as a versatile semiconductor platform for spin-based quantum information processing because it combines mature materials processing, access to spin-free isotopes, high mobilities, small effective masses, and strong but engineerable spin--orbit coupling. However, ``Ge qubits'' are not a single technology. Donor spin qubits, acceptor spin qubits, gate-defined hole spin qubits, and gate-defined electron spin qubits exploit different parts of the Ge band structure and therefore make distinct trade-offs among coherence, controllability, fabrication complexity, and scalability. Here we compare these four Ge-based spin-qubit modalities on a common physical and architectural footing. We review the shared Ge materials physics, including isotopic purification, the multivalley \(L\)-point conduction band, the spin-\(3/2\) valence band, heavy-hole/light-hole mixing, strain, interfaces, disorder, and phonons. We also introduce a common framework for estimating phononic-crystal-modified \(T_1\) using a calibrated reference relaxation rate, a geometry-dependent strain-density-of-states suppression factor, and parasitic relaxation channels. The comparison shows that gate-defined Ge hole-spin qubits currently offer the strongest combination of all-electrical control, demonstrated multiqubit operation, and scalability. Donor, acceptor, and gate-defined electron qubits remain important complementary directions for memory, hybrid, and exploratory architectures. Overall, Ge supports a diverse qubit ecosystem, with gate-defined hole-spin qubits presently providing the clearest path toward scalable Ge-based quantum processors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高纯锗（Ge）作为自旋基量子信息处理的多功能半导体平台重新兴起，因其兼具成熟的材料加工工艺、无自旋同位素的获取途径、高迁移率、小有效质量以及强且可工程化的自旋-轨道耦合。然而，“锗量子比特”并非单一技术。施主自旋量子比特、受主自旋量子比特、门定义空穴自旋量子比特和门定义电子自旋量子比特利用了锗能带结构的不同部分，因此在相干性、可控性、制备复杂性和可扩展性之间做出了不同的权衡。本文从共同的物理和架构基础出发，比较了这四种基于锗的自旋量子比特模式。我们回顾了锗材料的共性物理特性，包括同位素纯化、多谷$L$点导带、自旋$3/2$价带、重空穴/轻空穴混合、应变、界面、无序和声子。我们还引入了一个通用框架，用于通过校准参考弛豫率、几何依赖的应变态密度抑制因子以及寄生弛豫通道来估算声子晶体修正的$T_1$。比较表明，门定义锗空穴自旋量子比特目前在全电控、已展示的多量子比特操作和可扩展性方面提供了最强组合。施主、受主和门定义电子量子比特仍然是存储器、混合架构和探索性架构的重要互补方向。总体而言，锗支持多样化的量子比特生态系统，其中门定义空穴自旋量子比特目前为可扩展的锗基量子处理器提供了最清晰的路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-19 | D. -M. Mei et al. |
| 16 | **[Multi-level Random-Telegraph Noise Mitigation using a Single Spectator Qubit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17202v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Preserving quantum coherence in the presence of environmental noise is one of the principal challenges for quantum technologies. Noise mitigation using spectator qubits (SQs) has recently emerged as a promising approach, enabling indirect probing of the noise without disturbing the data qubit (DQ). However, existing analyses that probe ultimate performance have been restricted to two-state random telegraph process noise, which does not capture more complex noise processes that may arise in the environment. Therefore, we here develop a SQ-based noise mitigation for DQs subject to general multi-level fluctuator noise. We first derive the coherence dynamics of the DQ under such noise, then develop a mitigation scheme in which information about the noise is inferred from sequential SQ measurements and used for phase correction. A memory-efficient heuristic adaptive protocol is proposed to dynamically select the SQ measurement time and angle based on the current noise estimate. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed strategy significantly suppresses decoherence under multi-level noise, achieving performance comparable to that in the two-level case despite the increased complexity of the noise process.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在环境噪声存在下保持量子相干性是量子技术面临的主要挑战之一。利用旁观量子比特进行噪声抑制近期成为一种有前景的方法，可在不干扰数据量子比特的情况下间接探测噪声。然而，现有分析极限性能的研究仅限于双态随机电报过程噪声，无法涵盖环境中可能出现的更复杂噪声过程。因此，我们在此开发了一种基于旁观量子比特的噪声抑制方案，适用于受一般多级涨落噪声影响的数据量子比特。我们首先推导了该噪声下数据量子比特的相干动力学，然后提出一种抑制方案：通过连续旁观量子比特测量推断噪声信息，并用于相位校正。我们提出了一种内存高效的自适应启发式协议，根据当前噪声估计动态选择旁观量子比特的测量时间和角度。数值模拟表明，所提出的策略能显著抑制多级噪声下的退相干，尽管噪声过程复杂度增加，其性能仍可与两级情况相媲美。</p></details> | 2026-07-19 | Yanan Liu et al. |
| 17 | **[Four-state discrimination for a pair of spin qubits via gate reflectometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07806v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Single-electron spin qubits defined in quantum dots are used as building blocks of a semiconductor-based quantum computer. Readout in a scaled-up version of such a quantum computer is expected to rely on the Pauli Spin Blockade (PSB) mechanism. A desired functionality of PSB readout is that it reveals two bits of information on the two spin qubits that are involved in the process, such that the four computational basis states can be discriminated. In this work, we propose and quantitatively analyze an experimental procedure, based on gate reflectometry, which enables this four-state discrimination in a single measurement. We provide an intuitive recipe to maximize the contrast between the quantum capacitances of the four basis states. Focusing on silicon double quantum dots equipped with a micromagnet, we quantify how amplifier noise and phonon-mediated relaxation influence readout fidelity. Our results highlight a realistic opportunity to mitigate the overhead of readout ancilla qubits in a spin-based quantum computer.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子点中定义的单电子自旋量子比特被用作半导体量子计算机的构建模块。在规模化量子计算机中，读出预计将依赖泡利自旋阻塞机制。泡利自旋阻塞读出的一个理想功能是揭示过程中涉及的两个自旋量子比特的两比特信息，从而区分四个计算基态。本文提出并定量分析了一种基于栅极反射测量法的实验流程，可在单次测量中实现四态区分。我们提供了直观的步骤来最大化四个基态量子电容的对比度。聚焦于配备微磁体的硅双量子点，我们量化了放大器噪声和声子介导的弛豫对读出保真度的影响。我们的结果突显了在自旋量子计算机中减轻读出辅助量子比特开销的现实可能性。</p></details> | 2026-07-19 | Aritra Sen et al. |
| 18 | **[Biased-Noise Quantum Reed--Solomon Codes and a Tornado Concatenation for Cat Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13105v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Dissipative cat qubits exponentially suppress one Pauli error channel with the mean photon number, leaving the conjugate bit-flip error as the dominant failure mode. This strong noise bias makes the full machinery of general quantum error correction unnecessary: a code need only protect against a single error type, and any classical linear code can be promoted to a Clifford stabilizer code that does exactly this. We use this observation to build a \emph{bit-flip-only} quantum Reed--Solomon (RS) code. Starting from the maximum-distance-separable RS code $[7,3,5]$ over $\GF(2^3)$, we binary-expand it to the linear code $[21,9,6]$ over $\GF(2)$ and realize it as a $[[21,9,d_X=6,d_Z=1]]$ bit-flip code whose stabilizers are products of $Z$ operators. Because no phase-flip correction is attempted, the construction discards the redundancy that standard quantum RS codes spend on correcting $Z$ errors -- which a strongly biased cat qubit renders unnecessary -- and yields a shallow Clifford circuit that samples directly in Stim. Errors are decoded by an optimal bounded-distance syndrome-lookup table. We then introduce a \emph{Tornado} architecture: a two-layer concatenation that wraps every position of the outer RS code in an inner distance-three repetition code, yielding a $[[63,9,18]]$ code decoded by a two-stage inner majority vote and outer lookup decoder. Monte-Carlo simulation shows that at a physical bit-flip rate $p=0.1$ the Tornado code reaches a logical error rate $\pL \approx 5.3\times10^{-3}$, below both parent codes, and that its logical error rate scales as $\pL \propto p^{6}$ at low $p$, in contrast to $p^{2}$ for the repetition code and $p^{3}$ for the standalone RS code. We give the exact construction, the error and circuit model, an asymptotic scaling analysis, and an honest account of the overhead cost and single-shot assumptions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>耗散猫量子比特以平均光子数指数级抑制一个泡利误差通道，使共轭比特翻转误差成为主要失效模式。这种强噪声偏置使得通用量子纠错的完整机制变得不必要：只需一个能抵御单一误差类型的编码，任何经典线性码都可提升为恰好实现此功能的克利福德稳定子码。我们利用这一观察构建了一个仅比特翻转的量子里德-所罗门码。从伽罗瓦域GF(2³)上的最大距离可分里德-所罗门码[7,3,5]出发，我们将其二进制扩展为GF(2)上的线性码[21,9,6]，并实现为[[21,9,d_X=6,d_Z=1]]比特翻转码，其稳定子为Z算符的乘积。由于不尝试相位翻转校正，该构造舍弃了标准量子里德-所罗门码用于校正Z误差的冗余——强偏置猫量子比特使其不再必要——并生成一个可直接在Stim中采样的浅层克利福德电路。误差通过最优有界距离综合征查找表解码。随后我们引入龙卷风架构：一种两层级联结构，将外层里德-所罗门码的每个位置包裹在内层距离三重复码中，生成[[63,9,18]]码，通过内层多数投票和外层查找表的两阶段解码。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，在物理比特翻转率p=0.1时，龙卷风码的逻辑错误率pL≈5.3×10⁻³，低于两个母码；在低p时其逻辑错误率标度为pL∝p⁶，而重复码为p²，独立里德-所罗门码为p³。我们给出了精确构造、误差与电路模型、渐近标度分析，并对开销成本和单次假设进行了诚实评估。</p></details> | 2026-07-18 | Cheng-You Ho et al. |
| 19 | **[Geometric Qubits in Programmable Atomic Trimers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16846v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by programmable tweezer arrays, we develop an exactly solvable shape-space theory for near-equilateral atomic trimers. The Higgs oscillator on Kendall's shape sphere gives a nonresonant spectral lattice whose fixed-angular-momentum relative-stationary minimizers are supported on two adjacent admissible sites. These symmetry-selected doublets are separated from higher relative-stationary branches by a finite branch gap. With phase-coherent shape-mode driving and Rydberg-mediated conditional phases, they furnish a candidate route to geometric qubits and entangling operations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受可编程镊子阵列启发，我们为近等边原子三聚体发展了一种精确可解的形空间理论。肯德尔形球上的希格斯振荡子产生一个非共振谱格，其固定角动量的相对平稳极小值支撑在两个相邻允许格点上。这些对称性选择的双重态通过有限分支间隙与更高相对平稳分支分离。结合相位相干形模驱动和里德伯介导的条件相位，它们为几何量子比特和纠缠操作提供了候选路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-18 | Julien Garaud et al. |
| 20 | **[Hybrid qubit-oscillator module from motional states of two interacting atoms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.06429v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a qubit-oscillator platform based on the motional states of two interacting atoms in an optical tweezer. By stroboscopically modulating an engineered trap with tunable anharmonicity, we implement a complete set of bosonic operations and their qubit-controlled counterparts with high fidelity. This motional control enables accurate detection of magnetic dipolar interactions with $\sim10$ Hz sensitivity in one second, reaching sub-Hz resolution within a few minutes in a $20\times20$ tweezer array under realistic experimental imperfections. Our approach establishes a versatile platform for motional quantum control of two atoms, with applications to spin-boson physics and precision sensing of interaction potentials and trapping environments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出一种基于光镊中两个相互作用原子运动状态的量子比特-振荡器平台。通过频闪调制具有可调非谐性的工程化陷阱，我们以高保真度实现了一整套玻色子操作及其量子比特控制对应操作。这种运动控制使得在1秒内以约10赫兹的灵敏度精确检测磁偶极相互作用成为可能，在20×20镊子阵列中，在现实实验不完美条件下，几分钟内可达亚赫兹分辨率。我们的方法为双原子的运动量子控制建立了一个多功能平台，可应用于自旋-玻色子物理以及相互作用势和陷阱环境的精密传感。</p></details> | 2026-07-17 | Jaeyong Hwang et al. |
